{{Infobox location
| name = Akura vault
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] contains [[natural treasures]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] is a location with a [[gate]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] is an enormous interior that extends into a mountain.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault]] is difficult to break.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
